_note: Own offer appears in P11 as active. Self-filter removes it. Remaining competitor at €29.50. ownTotal(current_price_cents=2849 + 0 shipping)=2849 < competitorLowest(2950) → position=1 (we're cheaper than the only remaining competitor). competitor2nd=null → HOLD + hold-already-in-1st. NOTE: the story-7.2 spec narrative for Fixture 7 reasoned 'position=2 because own not in filtered list → UNDERCUT' — that reasoning is incorrect. Position is determined by comparing own current_price+shipping to filteredOffers[0], not by absence from the filtered list. The engine math in the line above is authoritative; the fixture and test assertion are the canonical contract for this scenario.
